audit_items.proof_trace: No caching of inclusion proof results exists. Verification is called on every gossip validation (line 630). The dedup check (line 623-625) occurs before verification but only matches sidecars previously validated and stored. The dedup key (block_root, slot, proposer_index, index) cryptographically commits to kzg_commitments via body_root through merkle tree binding, preventing different commitments from bypassing verification.
